body.title: Consolidate all dev-process artifacts into devlab/runtime/memory/ (sole home); retire lab/ + design_docs; architecture docs become uniform JSON intention-points; day-close monitors path-moves
body.source: Authored canonically (no lab/design_docs .md stub — this decision dog-foods its own law).
body.text:
# D-canonical-memory-consolidation-2026-06-23
**title:** Consolidate all dev-process artifacts into devlab/runtime/memory/ as the sole home; retire lab/ + devlab/design_docs[_for_igor]/; architecture docs become uniform JSON intention-points; day-close monitors path-moves.
**date:** 2026-06-23
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-skill-write-paths-canonical, T-retire-decision-folders, T-retire-designdocs-architecture, T-lab-designdocs-ref-sweep, T-architecture-intention-points, T-path-moves-monitor, T-consequence-canonical-memory-consolidation

## Decision narrative
devlab/runtime/memory/ is the SOLE home for every dev-process artifact — tickets, decisions, design patterns, notes, slates, sessions, rules, proofs, project descriptions, and architecture intention-points. lab/, devlab/design_docs/, and devlab/design_docs_for_igor/ are retired and invalid. The drift was concrete: stale skill write-paths (the running ~/.claude/skills copy of /sorted) misfiled days of recent decisions to dead lab/design_docs/ before anyone noticed — incl. D-proof-on-close, D-system-alarms-and-tier-requests, and D-workflow-md-source-of-truth (the last misfiled THIS session). The law is recorded in CLAUDE.md (commit 5de3e3e6); this decision is the execution + a regression guard. Architecture docs become uniform devlab/runtime/memory/architecture/<subsystem>.json intention-points: a summary of how the subsystem works + pointers to the files that implement it (intent -> implementation, in JSON). A day-close path-moves monitor (Python, file-index-backed) tickets/alarms any artifact written outside the canonical home, so a renamed store can never silently split the source of truth again.

## Decomposition (7 tickets)
1. T-skill-write-paths-canonical (M) — root cause: every writing skill, including the RUNNING ~/.claude/skills copy (kept in sync with repo skills/), writes only to devlab/runtime/memory/; decision narrative preserved in the canonical JSON body.text.
2. T-retire-decision-folders (S, gate #1) — remove lab/, devlab/design_docs_for_igor/, devlab/design_docs/decisions/ after verifying JSON counterparts.
3. T-retire-designdocs-architecture (S, gate #5) — remove the design_docs/ architecture remnants ONLY after they are converted (avoids the single-gate data-loss path).
4. T-lab-designdocs-ref-sweep (M, gate #1) — sweep ~80 read-refs to canonical, proven by grep zero (exclusion-aware; folds T-day-close-audit-skill-stale-paths + the done T-lab-claudecode-path-sweep).
5. T-architecture-intention-points (L) — classify-first: subsystem architecture -> architecture/<subsystem>.json; narrative essays (docs/the_ownership_gap) are NOT forced into the schema.
6. T-path-moves-monitor (M) — Python day-close monitor + JSON registry; flags non-canonical writes via the existing file index.
7. T-consequence-canonical-memory-consolidation (S, gate 2026-07-07).

## Amendments applied at /sorted (advisor, 2026-06-23)
- Fix must reach the RUNNING ~/.claude/skills copy, not just repo skills/ (else closes-while-broken).
- Split the folder-removal ticket: single-valued gate can't express 'after #1 AND #4'; design_docs architecture must not be deleted before conversion (data-loss).
- Ticket 4 classify-first: the_ownership_gap is narrative, not subsystem architecture.
- .md->JSON authoring: narrative preserved in body.text is the invariant; the .md form is not unilaterally killed.

## Hypothesis
Every dev-process artifact lives only under devlab/runtime/memory/; lab/ + devlab/design_docs[_for_igor]/ no longer exist; grep finds zero non-artifact refs; no skill (incl. the running copy) writes outside the canonical home; the day-close monitor tickets any new out-of-home write.

## Measurement Signal
grep -rnE "(^|[^v])lab/|design_docs/" (excluding the canonical store + this decision's artifacts) returns zero; a functional test asserts the writing skills emit to devlab/runtime/memory/decisions/ with narrative in body.text and nothing under lab/; the path-moves monitor emits a ticket/alarm on a planted non-canonical write and is silent on a clean tree.

## Goal Link
none: dev-process source-of-truth integrity / 'the tool disappears' (friction reduction).
